scripts.build: rm -rf www && mkdir -p www && cp index.html manifest.json sw.js robots.txt www/ && cp -r css js assets www/
scripts.sync: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.icons: for e in mipmap-mdpi:48 mipmap-hdpi:72 mipmap-xhdpi:96 mipmap-xxhdpi:144 mipmap-xxxhdpi:192; do d=${e%%:*}; s=${e##*:}; magick assets/icons/icon-512.png -resize ${s}x${s} android/app/src/main/res/$d/ic_launcher.png; magick assets/icons/icon-512.png -resize ${s}x${s} android/app/src/main/res/$d/ic_launcher_round.png; magick assets/icons/icon-512.png -resize ${s}x${s} android/app/src/main/res/$d/ic_launcher_foreground.png; done
scripts.apk: npm run check && npm run sync && npm run icons && cd android && JAVA_HOME=/opt/android-studio/jbr ANDROID_HOME=$HOME/Android/Sdk ./gradlew clean assembleDebug && cd .. && mkdir -p apks && cp android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk "apks/breaktime-rebellion-v$(node -p 'require("./package.json").version').apk" && rclone copy "apks/breaktime-rebellion-v$(node -p 'require("./package.json").version').apk" "luca.forina:Breaktime-Rebellion/" && echo "APK caricato su Drive: apks/breaktime-rebellion-v$(node -p 'require("./package.json").version').apk"
scripts.aab: npm run check && npm run sync && npm run icons && cd android && JAVA_HOME=/opt/android-studio/jbr ANDROID_HOME=$HOME/Android/Sdk ./gradlew clean bundleRelease && cd .. && mkdir -p apks && cp android/app/build/outputs/bundle/release/app-release.aab "apks/breaktime-rebellion-v$(node -p 'require("./package.json").version').aab" && rclone copy "apks/breaktime-rebellion-v$(node -p 'require("./package.json").version').aab" "luca.forina:Breaktime-Rebellion/" && echo "AAB firmato caricato su Drive: apks/breaktime-rebellion-v$(node -p 'require("./package.json").version').aab"
scripts.deploy:itch: npm run build && butler push www lucazade80/breaktime-rebellion:web
